subject: Tuck's age
fact: Tuck is Toblen's nine-year-old son.

subject: Red Brands killing
fact: The Red Brands killed a man named Tell Dendar in broad daylight.
source_quote: the Red Brands had killed a man named Tell Dendar in broad daylight

subject: Sleeping Giant location
fact: The Sleeping Giant tap house is located on Phandalin's Main Street.

subject: Daran Edermath age
fact: Daran Edermath is a retired drow adventurer over 500 years old.

subject: Red Brands estimated count
fact: Daran estimated between 3 and 10 Red Brands are at Tresendar Manor.

subject: goblin lookout count
fact: Zenvon spotted two goblins and one goblin boss in a lookout post.
source_quote: two goblins and one goblin boss

subject: surprise round
fact: The goblins were surprised, granting the party a free first round.
source_quote: surprised, granting the party a free first round

subject: goblin combatants
fact: The party engaged two goblins and one goblin boss in combat.
source_quote: two goblins and one goblin boss

subject: Veyra damage to goblin boss
fact: Veyra's magic missile dealt 3 points of damage to the goblin boss.

subject: Zenvon critical hit
fact: Zenvon rolled a natural 20 with a dagger to kill one goblin.

subject: Veyra damage to second goblin
fact: Veyra's Firebolt killed the second goblin with 5 points of damage.

subject: Zenvon short sword damage
fact: Zenvon hit the goblin boss with a short sword for 9 points of damage.

subject: Maela mace damage
fact: Sister Maela hit the goblin boss with her mace for 6 points of damage.

subject: goblin boss attacks
fact: The goblin boss attacked Pip twice with a scimitar.

subject: Pip snare height
fact: Pip was suspended 10 feet above the ground after failing a saving throw against a snare.

subject: Zenvon stealth roll
fact: Zenvon made a stealth roll of 23 to avoid detection by a giant snake.

subject: wolf count
fact: Zenvon spotted three wolves chained in the cave.

subject: snake count
fact: Zenvon came face-to-face with a giant coiled poisonous snake.

subject: goblin boss armor class
fact: The goblin boss had an armor class of 17.

subject: Zenvon dagger roll
fact: Zenvon's dagger roll totaled 7 against the goblin boss's armor class.

subject: Zenvon short sword roll
fact: Zenvon's short sword roll totaled 20 against the goblin boss's armor class.

subject: Zenvon to-hit bonus javelin
fact: Without proficiency, Zenvon has a +1 to hit with the javelin.

subject: Zenvon to-hit bonus javelin with proficiency
fact: With proficiency, Zenvon has a +5 to hit with the javelin.

subject: goblin boss initiative
fact: The goblins rolled a 21 for initiative.
